title: Move chevron next to category tag in expanded chatroom header

requirements.summary: Reposition the chevron icon to appear directly adjacent to the category tag in the chatroom header when in expanded (non-collapsed) state
acceptanceCriteria: The chevron icon is rendered adjacent to the category tag in the chatroom header when the panel is expanded (not collapsed).
No visual style changes (colors, font sizes, spacing, layout) are introduced anywhere in the component.
The chevron continues to function correctly (toggling collapse/expand) after being repositioned.
The collapsed state of the header remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Move the chevron button element in the JSX so it appears directly next to the category tag in the expanded header state. Locate the chevron button (likely wrapped in a button with collapse/expand toggle logic) and reposition it adjacent to the category tag element within the header's expanded layout. Do not modify any className props, inline styles, or other attributes—only change the element's position in the JSX tree. Ensure the collapsed state header layout remains unchanged.
